# Material You (M3) Principles

Material You centers on personalization, adaptive shapes, and expressive motion.

## Core Features
- Large corner radii (`rounded-3xl` or fully rounded controls)
- Tonal palette from a seed color (primary/secondary/tertiary/surface)
- Elevation via tonal shifts instead of heavy shadows
- Clean iconography with simple strokes

## Component Patterns
- Cards: subtle tinted surfaces + large radii
- Buttons: pill or rounded, filled/tonal variants
- Typography: clean sans-serif hierarchy

## Interaction
- Prefer subtle state transitions (hover/pressed/focus) through tonal changes and opacity
